summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that AMGN is currently testing its Daily 200MA support zone near $321.59. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 28.6%. This is a fresh test of the support, suggesting that optimal buy-side liquidity remains intact. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $355.16 and a significant trendline confluence around $334.45 (formed by 10 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
